note: Tasks decomposed from senior agent outputs for enterprise demo validation. 3 waves, max 8 juniors per wave.

tasks.description: Run pytest tests/test_brain_pipeline.py -v and report all 73 test results
tasks.acceptance: All 73 tests pass. Document any failures with error messages.

tasks.description: Run pytest tests/test_api_smoke.py -v and report results — verify zero 404/500 errors
tasks.acceptance: All smoke tests pass. Document HTTP status codes.

tasks.description: Run UI build check: cd suite-ui/aldeci && npx vite build --mode development. Report success/failure.
tasks.acceptance: Build succeeds with zero errors. TypeScript compilation clean.

tasks.description: Run python3 scripts/ctem_full_loop_demo.py --dry-run and verify all 36 steps defined. Check script syntax is valid Python.
tasks.acceptance: Script parses without SyntaxError. All 5 phases defined. Document step count.

tasks.description: Audit all Docker configs and compose files for exposed secrets, default passwords, and insecure settings
tasks.acceptance: Report: (1) any hardcoded secrets, (2) any privileged containers, (3) any exposed debug ports, (4) all health checks defined

tasks.description: Run pytest tests/test_autofix_engine_unit.py -v — verify AutoFix engine after backend-hardener changes
tasks.acceptance: All tests pass. Document test count and any failures.

tasks.description: Run pytest tests/test_backend_security.py -v — verify SSRF protection and shell injection prevention
tasks.acceptance: All security tests pass. Report test count and results.

tasks.description: Validate all 7 ALdeci Postman collections are valid JSON with correct endpoint URLs matching coordination-notes verified routes
tasks.acceptance: All 7 JSON files parse. Report total request count per collection. Flag any URLs that don't match verified routes.

tasks.description: Run ruff check suite-core/ and report total warnings/errors by category. Do NOT auto-fix.
tasks.acceptance: Report: total errors, top 5 error categories, files with most issues

tasks.description: Run ruff check suite-api/ and report total warnings/errors by category. Do NOT auto-fix.
tasks.acceptance: Report: total errors, top 5 error categories, files with most issues

tasks.description: Run ruff check suite-attack/ and report total warnings/errors. Do NOT auto-fix.
tasks.acceptance: Report: total errors, top 5 categories

tasks.description: Run pytest tests/test_compliance.py tests/test_compliance_engine_unit.py -v — verify compliance engine for DEMO-011
tasks.acceptance: All compliance tests pass. Report test count and results.

tasks.description: Run pytest tests/test_comprehensive_e2e.py -v — validate end-to-end flows work
tasks.acceptance: All E2E tests pass. Document any integration failures.

tasks.description: Run python3 scripts/mcp_gateway_demo.py --dry-run — verify MCP demo script is valid
tasks.acceptance: Script parses without error. Document functions/steps defined.

tasks.description: Check requirements.txt for pinned versions and known vulnerable patterns (no ==1.0 for major libs)
tasks.acceptance: Report: total deps, unpinned deps, any deps with known critical CVEs in version range

tasks.description: Validate all 8 security artifacts in .claude/team-state/threat-architect/feeds/ are valid JSON/YAML
tasks.acceptance: All 8 files parse. Report: filename, format, record count per file.

tasks.description: Run python3 -c 'import ast; ast.parse(open("scripts/demo_self_learning.py").read())' to validate demo script syntax
tasks.acceptance: Script parses without SyntaxError. Document main functions.

tasks.description: Run pytest tests/test_attestation.py tests/test_cicd_signature.py -v — verify evidence signing chain
tasks.acceptance: All tests pass. Report crypto/signing test results.

tasks.description: Count total TypeScript files, LOC, and component count in suite-ui/aldeci/src/
tasks.acceptance: Report: total .tsx files, total .ts files, total LOC, components count, pages count

tasks.description: Count all API endpoints by prefix and generate endpoint inventory report
tasks.acceptance: Report: endpoint count per router prefix, total endpoints, any 404-prone paths
